description_long: This is a heavily modified, armored combat tactical vehicle with a rugged, post-apocalyptic design. The body is primarily blue with significant weathering and snow or frost accumulation, suggesting use in harsh, cold environments. The front features a reinforced metal grille and a prominent hood scoop, while the roof is equipped with a large, mounted rotary machine gun. The sides display thick, bolted armor plating and oversized, off-road tires with deep treads for enhanced traction. The rear of the vehicle has dual exhaust pipes, a metal cargo rack, and visible fuel tanks, all protected by additional armor. The overall appearance is aggressive and utilitarian, built for both offense and defense in urban or hostile settings.
description: A blue, armored combat vehicle with heavy weathering, a roof-mounted rotary gun, reinforced grille, and large off-road tires. Its rugged design features thick armor plating and visible rear fuel tanks.
description_view_0: Front view shows the reinforced metal grille, hood scoop, and the rotary machine gun mounted on the roof.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the thick armor plating, large off-road tire, and the full length of the roof-mounted weapon.
description_view_2: Rear view displays dual exhaust pipes, a metal cargo rack, exposed fuel tanks, and rear armor plating.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the armor, tire, and weapon mount, with additional detail on the rear cargo area.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One large rotary machine gun mount on the roof, centrally positioned.
attribute_armor_plating: Visible thick armor plating covers the full body, including reinforced front grille, side panels, and rear. The armor appears bolted and weathered, with some sloped sections for deflection.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: No camouflage pattern; vehicle is painted blue with heavy white weathering and rust patches.
attribute_tire_type: Four large off-road tires with deep, aggressive tread pattern; appear reinforced for rugged terrain.
